blended.narrative: 49 Degrees North is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
